actions.value: Attached is your login package. You will want to contact a service such as walletrecoveryservices.com which is a third party that will help you to regain access to your account.  NOTE: They will take a percentage of what is in the wallet. If you do not have funds in the wallet this process isn't necessary you can simply create a new account. You can also continue to guess your password. Please let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.
